src: R Package for Calculating Healthy Eating Index-2020 (HEI2020), Alternative Healthy Eating Index (AHEI),  Dietary Approaches to Stop Hypertension (DASH), Mediterranean Diet (MED), Dietary Inflammation Index (DII), and Planetary Health Diet Index from the EAT-Lancet Commission (PHDI) for the NHANES, ASA24, DHQ, and other dietary assessments
ja: NHANES、ASA24、DHQ などの食事調査を対象に、HEI-2020、AHEI、DASH、地中海食、DII、PHDI を算出する R パッケージ
